div.h3: Technical Specification: Spatial Locality & Cache Line Utilization

g.text: Performance Benchmark: SoA Speedup relative to AoS

div.p: SoA speedup is a direct consequence of Spatial Locality and reduction of Bus Traffic.

ul.li: AoS: Reading field 'X' fetches 'Y, Z, V, M' into L1, wasting ~85% of cache line bandwidth if unused.
SoA: Reading field 'X' fetches 16 contiguous 'X' values, achieving 100% cache line utilization.

div.p: Crossover Rule: When field access > 85%, SoA loses advantage due to TLB pressure and multiple stream overhead.

g.text: Array of Structures (AoS) - Interleaved [Size: 32B per Obj]
